input.background: We propose to draw boxplots for the air sample data presented in prior illustrations (see Table 4.2).
input.question: For site 1, calculate the interquartile range (IQR) and determine the fences for outliers. Are there any outliers?

output.answer: $\mathrm{IQR}=40-26=14$. Therefore, Fence $_{\text {Lower }}=26-(1.5)(14)=5$ and Fence $_{\text {Upper }}=40+(1.5)(14)=61$. There are no values below the lower fence. There is one value (68) above the upper fence. The upper outside value of 68 is plotted as a separate point above the box.
